info.title: deps
info.description: List and search the transitive dependency hierarchy tree of NuGet packages in a .NET project

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Show hierarchy of transitive NuGet package dependencies in a C# project, like Eclipse m2e or 'npm ls' do.

options.name: --filter
options.description: Only show the given package and its dependents, hiding unrelated packages. Pass a name like System.Text.Json, or omit to show all transitive dependencies.

arguments.name: PROJECTDIR
arguments.description: Directory of a C# project, which should contain an obj subdirectory. Typically contains a .csproj file. Defaults to current working directory.
